summary: Tested UI/UX fixes for multi-role users (beneficiary who became benefactor). All 4 fixes verified working: (1) Estate Photo section shows for is_also_benefactor users, (2) ViewSwitcher dropdown in dashboard header, (3) Mobile hamburger menu has SWITCH VIEW section with inline ViewSwitcher, (4) BeneficiaryDashboard includes ViewSwitcher (code verified).
critical_code_review_comments: ViewSwitcher.js (Line 16-17): isMultiRole correctly checks user?.is_also_benefactor || user?.is_also_beneficiary
ViewSwitcher.js (Line 33): Returns null when not multi-role - proper conditional rendering
ViewSwitcher.js (Line 99-165): Dropdown variant has proper data-testid attributes for testing
ViewSwitcher.js (Line 40-94): Inline variant for mobile menu properly styled
SettingsPage.js (Line 302): Estate Photo condition updated to include is_also_benefactor
DashboardPage.js (Lines 19-20, 431): ViewSwitcher imported and placed next to EstateSelector
BeneficiaryDashboardPage.js (Lines 9, 148-150): ViewSwitcher imported and added to header
MobileNav.js (Lines 596-606): SWITCH VIEW section with inline ViewSwitcher for multi-role users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-role ViewSwitcher testing complete. Test user fulltest@test.com has role='benefactor' and is_also_benefactor=true, but is NOT a beneficiary on any other estate. To fully test ViewSwitcher with both views (benefactor/beneficiary), need a user who is both a benefactor AND a beneficiary on another estate. The ViewSwitcher correctly shows 1 owned estate and 0 beneficiary estates for this user.

verified_features.settings_estate_photo_for_is_also_benefa: PASS - Estate Photo section visible at /settings for user with is_also_benefactor=true
verified_features.dashboard_viewswitcher_dropdown: PASS - ViewSwitcher with data-testid='view-switcher' appears in dashboard header next to EstateSelector
verified_features.viewswitcher_dropdown_opens: PASS - Clicking trigger opens dropdown with 'Switch View' header
verified_features.viewswitcher_shows_owned_estates: PASS - Shows 1 owned estate (My Estate - Benefactor) with Active label
verified_features.viewswitcher_shows_beneficiary_estates: PASS - Shows 0 beneficiary estates (expected for this user)
verified_features.mobile_hamburger_switch_view_section: PASS - 'SWITCH VIEW' section found in mobile hamburger menu
verified_features.mobile_viewswitcher_inline_buttons: PASS - 1 owner view switch button found in mobile menu
verified_features.beneficiary_dashboard_viewswitcher_code: PASS - Code review confirms ViewSwitcher imported and added at line 148-150
